title: WHERE clause that uses a NUMERIC cast influences the result type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 FLOAT, c2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'test');
CREATE VIEW v2(c0, c1) AS SELECT CAST(c1 AS DECIMAL(10, 2)), COUNT(*) FROM t1 GROUP BY c0;
SELECT v2.c0 FROM v2 WHERE v2.c0 = 1.5;
SELECT v2.c0 FROM v2 WHERE v2.c0 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: WHERE clause with NUMERIC cast alters result type
